name: m8-platform-docs
description: Diplodoc-based API reference for the M8 Platform

scripts.sync:api: npm run sync:openapi && npm run sync:grpc
scripts.build: npm run sync:api && yfm build --input . --output dist --ignore dist --allow-html -e ./extensions/openapi-extension.cjs
scripts.dev: npm run sync:api && yfm build --input . --output dist --ignore dist --allow-html -e ./extensions/openapi-extension.cjs --watch
